description: Copy the current note as a rich hyperlink to the clipboard. Pastes as a single clickable link in rich-text editors like FuseBase, Notion, and Confluence. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Copy as Rich URL

releases.author: brianling
releases.description: Drops deprecated `builtin-modules` npm package — uses Node's built-in `module.builtinModules` instead. No functional changes for end users.

releases.author: brianling
releases.description:
Initial release.

Copy current note as a rich hyperlink (title + `obsidian://` URL) to the clipboard. Writes both `text/html` and `text/plain` formats so rich-text editors (FuseBase, Notion, Confluence, Slack, Gmail) render a single clickable link.

**Install**
1. Download `main.js` and `manifest.json` from this release.
2. Drop into `<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/copy-as-rich-url/`.
3. Settings → Community plugins → Reload → enable **Copy as Rich URL**.
